stdout:
Table	Create Table
onboarding_responses	CREATE TABLE `onboarding_responses` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `websiteId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','in_progress','completed') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `stepCurrent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `businessName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `tagline` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `foundedYear` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `teamSize` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `usp` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `topServices` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `targetAudience` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `faqItems` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `logoUrl` varchar(1024) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `photoUrls` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `legalOwner` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `legalStreet` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `legalZip` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `legalCity` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `legalCountry` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'Deutschland',
  `legalEmail` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `legalPhone` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `legalVatId` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `legalRegister` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `legalRegisterCourt` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `legalResponsible` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `addOnContactForm` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `addOnGallery` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `addOnSubpages` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `completedAt` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `businessCategory` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `brandColor` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `brandSecondaryColor` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `headlineFont` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `heroPhotoUrl` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `aboutPhotoUrl` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `idx_website_id` (`websiteId`),
  UNIQUE KEY `website_id` (`websiteId`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=180001
